items.name_cn:
Large
【Balenciaga】New Crush Tote 'Trash Bag', perfectly combining Trash and Crush elements, the wrinkled texture highlights the excellent touch, soft glossy calf leather + gold aged hardware + drawstring closure + logo print, the actual product is lighter than the 22bag, cowhide is more durable than sheepskin, captures the essence of the 'trash bag' better than Chanel, a large capacity bucket bag, items can be easily thrown into the bag, the drawstring design is this year's trend, just pull to close the bag mouth, the chain design allows for hand, shoulder, or underarm, slip bag, and other carrying methods. Casual, unconstrained is the attitude this bag should have✔️
Model: BG0305, Large size: 43*15*35cm; Small size: 27*10*32cm.

items.name_cn:
Large
👄Dior New TOUJOURS Handbag, this Dior Toujours handbag debuted at the Spring/Summer 2023 show, featuring a casual and practical design. Crafted from imported calfskin, it is detailed with oversized houndstooth quilting. The spacious interior features a pocket for neatly organizing daily essentials. It features a leather strap closure and a CD Lock letter D turn-lock closure, with adjustable sides to elevate the style. Large size, leather handle with adjustable details, can be carried by hand or on the shoulder. CD Lock and strap closure, D.I.O.R. charm, detachable inner pouch, adjustable leather handle, includes dust bag! Model: M1188L, Dimensions: 37 x 20 x 28.5 cm, Handle Length: 14 - 29 cm.

specs.rawTitle:
Large

items.name_en: Large 44cm New Arrival 26 Spring Series New Smile Bag 👛
items.name_cn:
Large 44cm New Arrival 26 Spring Series New Smile Bag 👛
😐 turns to 🙂, the CE Smile Bag returns refreshed!
CE PRINTEMPS 2026 Spring Series!
NEW LARGE New Smile Bag
The classic from memory, returns with a fresh look!
👜 Lightweight material, modern lines
It is still that It Bag with maximum recognizability!
Exuding a simple and sleek modern temperament. The new Creative Director Michael Rider surprised everyone with the return of the "Smile Bag" at the 2026 Spring debut. The smooth, fine, and glossy leather, combined with topstitching and piping, shapes a soft, rounded horizontal silhouette. The side zipper design presents a unique smile arc, cleverly echoing the name "Smile Bag." By reinterpreting the classic design with a modern silhouette, the overall bag is lighter and more versatile, presenting an elegant yet casual style!
Style No.: 123683
Color: Black
Dimensions: Base 44x16x30cm, Opening 69cm

Toujours series latest autumn/winter grained leather, absolutely stunning, high-visibility large bag, very fresh color, eye-catching, effortlessly exudes a premium feel. Oversized quilted grained leather design paired with classic letter accessories, very modern and stylish. The bag structure is soft, calfskin material feels luxurious, unique clasp design allows the sides to fold when closed. Capacity is very nice, thoughtfully includes an inner pocket for small items.
size:37*27*21cm

items.name_cn:
Large Monogram
New FENDI First is here!!
Designed by Kim Jones, this is the first FENDI bag, overturning previous shapes. Metal trim and large logo lock combined with the body design deconstructs architectural art and fashion, elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Perfect for evening clutching, and crossbody gives a high-end street chic feel!
Large Size 32.5x15x23.5cm
